# BP-163 negative variant: the renamed update flag is guarded by testing.Short.
lang: go
file: BP-163-variant-safe_test.go
variant: renamed-update-with-short
---
package snapshots

import (
	"flag"
	"os"
	"testing"
)

var updateGolden = flag.Bool("update-golden", false, "rewrite snapshots")

func TestSnapshot(t *testing.T) {
	if *updateGolden && !testing.Short() {
		if _, err := os.Create("testdata/snapshot.json"); err != nil {
			t.Fatal(err)
		}
	}
}
